comparison_method: intersect Paper 3 holdout IDs with Paper 2 per-id refusal judgments

training_mix.rebalance_method: down-sample help-side (overref) to match refuse-side (core_s2 + xl) at SEED-keyed RNG

notes: Beta 0.3 produced the worst toxicity regression of all three Qwen runs (-15.1 pp) while flat-lining cross-lingual.
Jailbreak returned to base; over-refusal drifted further the wrong way.
The data-mix and beta knobs both move things but neither moves them in a useful direction simultaneously.
On Qwen-2.5-3B-Instruct at 187 (or 176) pairs, RD-DPO does not produce a clean safety lift. None of the three knob combinations beats base on toxicity + jailbreak + cross-lingual jointly.
